args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(opp.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(TRIM(REPLACE(c.CompanySignedDate,'#','')) AS DATE) - CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(REPLACE(opp.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(opp.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(TRIM(REPLACE(c.CompanySignedDate,'#','')) AS DATE) - CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(REPLACE(opp.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(opp.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
